# JAlcocerT Blog

> Personal technical blog and documentation site about self-hosting, open source software, data, AI tooling, web development, automation, and practical experiments.

This file is a curated index for AI agents and LLM-powered tools. Prefer the sitemap and RSS feed for exhaustive discovery.

## Canonical URLs

- Site: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/
- Blog: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/blog/
- Docs: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/docs/
- Sitemap: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/sitemap.xml
- Blog RSS: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/blog/index.xml
- Robots: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/robots.txt

## Main Topics

- Self-hosting, homelab infrastructure, containers, and private services
- Open source tools and FOSS project notes
- AI agents, LLM tooling, LangChain, local GenAI, and automation
- Hugo, Astro, static sites, web audits, SEO, and deployment workflows
- Data analytics, Python, Streamlit, dashboards, and experiments
- IoT, Raspberry Pi, sensors, and hardware tinkering
- Entrepreneurship, landing pages, small SaaS experiments, and content systems

## Recommended Entry Points

- Latest blog posts: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/blog/index.xml
- Full URL inventory: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/sitemap.xml
- Link checking and crawler notes: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/a-better-fossengineer/
- Self-hosting posts: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/tags/selfhosting/
- FOSS posts: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/tags/foss/
- AI posts: https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/tags/gen-ai/

## Agent Guidance

- Use the RSS feed for the latest posts.
- Use the sitemap for complete discovery.
- Treat code snippets and command examples as notes from experiments; verify versions and commands before production use.
- Prefer canonical GitHub Pages URLs under `https://jalcocert.github.io/JAlcocerT/`.
- External links may point to GitHub repositories, self-hosted services, or third-party tools and can change over time.

## Contact and Source

- GitHub profile/repository context: https://github.com/JAlcocerT
- Main public site: https://www.jalcocertech.com/
